notes: Refines Pathmark accent themes to keep the visual design simple and sleek.
Removes decorative gradients and emoji-style seasonal markers from the Theme interface.
Improves contrast for muted text, Pathmark cards, borders and highlights in Streamlit dark mode.
Keeps Streamlit responsible for Light, Dark and System while Pathmark applies restrained accent styling only.
release_notes: Improves dark-mode contrast and simplifies accent themes by removing gradients and emoji-style seasonal decoration.
label: Sleek accent contrast refinement
